statement: This preprint reports an internally validated DEU posterior analysis and matched native-baseline comparison under the documented Stage 3B pipeline.
required_caveat: Author-led preprint; not independently peer-reviewed or externally replicated.

statement: The DEU production posterior is caveated and is based on the full-objective likelihood set used in the production sampler.
required_caveat: TT_lite was diagnostic-only and was not part of the sampled production likelihood.

statement: The matched native/baseline comparison is descriptive and readiness-cleared on both sides.
required_caveat: Descriptive comparison does not by itself establish model superiority.

statement: An internal independent-validation estimator reported a log-BF-style diagnostic favoring DEU over native within the documented estimator setup.
required_caveat: This is allowed only as internal estimator language with caveats, not as a peer-reviewed or final Bayes-factor claim.

statement: The replication package was frozen and checksum-verified for author-led reproducibility and future independent review.
required_caveat: No external reviewer result has been booked.
